task_completion.description: Disable the option for customers to place orders without an account
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce -> Settings -> Accounts & Privacy, under the 'Guest checkout' section, the checkbox for 'Allow customers to place orders without an account' must be UNCHECKED.

task_completion.description: Enable the option for customers to log into existing accounts during checkout
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Guest checkout' section, the checkbox for 'Allow customers to log into an existing account during checkout' must be CHECKED.

task_completion.description: Enable the option for customers to create accounts during checkout
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Account creation' section, the checkbox for 'Allow customers to create an account during checkout' must be CHECKED.

task_completion.description: Enable the option for customers to create accounts on the 'My Account' page
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Account creation' section, the checkbox for 'Allow customers to create an account on the "My account" page' must be CHECKED.

task_completion.description: Enable the removal of personal data from orders on erasure request
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Account erasure requests' section, the checkbox for 'Remove personal data from orders on request' must be CHECKED.

task_completion.description: Enable the removal of access to downloads on erasure request
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Account erasure requests' section, the checkbox for 'Remove access to downloads on request' must be CHECKED.

integrity.description: Agent used the WordPress admin dashboard GUI to change settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the WordPress admin interface (WooCommerce settings pages) rather than using terminal commands, WP-CLI, or direct database edits.
Look for the agent clicking the 'Save changes' button at the bottom of the page, or a success banner stating 'Your settings have been saved.' at the top of the screen.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual WooCommerce settings page
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL should indicate the WordPress admin area (e.g., wp-admin/admin.php?page=wc-settings&tab=account) and the page content should be the genuine WooCommerce Accounts & Privacy settings interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring six specific WooCommerce Accounts & Privacy settings via the WordPress admin dashboard: 1) Disable guest checkout ('Allow customers to place orders without an account' unchecked), 2) Enable checkout login reminder ('Allow customers to log into an existing account during checkout' checked), 3) Enable signup from checkout ('Allow customers to create an account during checkout' checked), 4) Enable My Account registration ('Allow customers to create an account on the "My account" page' checked), 5) Enable personal data removal from orders ('Remove personal data from orders on request' checked), and 6) Enable download access removal ('Remove access to downloads on request' checked). All these options are found in WooCommerce -> Settings -> Accounts & Privacy.
